task_completion.description: Read the contents of the widget snippet file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor showing the contents of '/home/ga/widget_code.html', specifically revealing the widget code.

task_completion.description: Locate and open a global layout Blade template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal showing a '.blade.php' file being opened or edited from within the '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/resources/views/' directory.

task_completion.description: Insert the widget snippet into the Blade template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing the widget code (specifically containing 'window.HelpDesk.widgetId = \'SB-99887766\';') pasted into the HTML structure of the Blade template.
Terminal showing a cache clearing command (such as 'php artisan cache:clear', 'php artisan view:clear', or 'php artisan optimize:clear') executed inside '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the widget code is present in the HTML source at http://localhost/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Web browser's 'View Page Source' / Developer Tools or a terminal 'curl' command targeting 'http://localhost/' that displays the injected widget snippet ('window.HelpDesk.widgetId = \'SB-99887766\';') in the output.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually modified the Blade template file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor (like nano, vim, VS Code) saving the file or valid terminal commands (like sed or echo) redirecting output into the actual '.blade.php' file, rather than just printing text to the console.

integrity.description: Verify the agent checked the live application URL rather than a local file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar or terminal command must explicitly show 'http://localhost/' being accessed, not a 'file://' URI or a local HTML file path.

integrity.description: Verify the application structure was not broken by the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: When 'http://localhost/' is accessed, it should return a valid HTML page or the Socioboard interface, without displaying raw PHP code, stack traces, or 500 Internal Server Error messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target widget snippet is located at '/home/ga/widget_code.html'. The expected widget identifier string to look for in the source code and templates is: `window.HelpDesk.widgetId = 'SB-99887766';`. The application directory is '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php'.
